title: What Our Customers Say
description:
Real reviews from our valued guests.
Experience authentic Indian cuisine in Wrocław.

items.title: Authentic Indian Flavors!
items.name: Marta K.
items.text: The best Indian food in Wrocław! Butter chicken was incredibly rich and flavorful. The naan bread is freshly made and perfect. Friendly staff and cozy atmosphere. Will definitely come back!

items.title: Amazing Biryani
items.name: Tomasz W.
items.text: Finally found authentic Indian cuisine in Poland! The chicken biryani was perfectly spiced and aromatic. Portions are generous and prices are reasonable. The masala chai is a must-try!

items.title: Vegetarian Paradise
items.name: Anna S.
items.text: Excellent vegetarian options! Tried palak paneer and dal makhani - both were delicious and authentic. Staff is very knowledgeable about ingredients. Great place for vegetarians and vegans!

items.title: Best Tandoori in Town
items.name: Piotr M.
items.text: The tandoori chicken is phenomenal! Perfectly marinated and cooked. The spice level was just right. Great location near city center and the service is always friendly and efficient.

items.title: Highly Recommend!
items.name: Karolina B.
items.text: Discovered this gem last month and have been back three times already! Every dish we tried was authentic and delicious. The samosas are crispy perfection. Kasturi is now our go-to for Indian food!

items.title: Wonderful Experience
items.name: Jan P.
items.text: Great food, great service, great prices! The curry was rich and flavorful with perfect spice levels. They even have coffee from Mała Czarna. Perfect spot for lunch or dinner!

items.title: Authentic & Fresh
items.name: Magdalena L.
items.text: You can taste the quality and freshness in every bite. The lamb rogan josh was tender and perfectly spiced. Staff is welcoming and helpful with recommendations. A true taste of India in Wrocław!

items.title: My Favorite Restaurant
items.name: Marcin D.
items.text: I eat here at least twice a week! Consistent quality, generous portions, and always delicious. The garlic naan and butter masala combination is unbeatable. Kasturi never disappoints!
